caption: The video displays a static screen capture of a website. At the top of the page, a blue header contains the IRS logo and the capitalized navigation links "SEARCH", "HELP", and "MENU". Below the header, a white background features the bold, black text "News Releases for Current Month". The screen is framed by a browser interface, including a series of open tabs at the very top and a taskbar at the bottom with various application icons. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains entirely stationary; there are no people present, no movement, and no changes to the on-screen text or layout. Each frame shows the exact same view of the webpage, maintaining a consistent composition and visual state.
